notes:
- Copy AI Prompt button - copies a context hand-off prompt (auto-filled with the user's project paths) so a fresh AI chat uses the bridge instead of refusing.
- Dev / production split - running from source (run_qt.bat) is an isolated DEV build (own settings folder, own startup key, amber DEV badge); the .exe is production. Testing can't touch the real install.
- Fixed activity-log spam / rules-file loop - atomic write_json, rule reconcile only on project connect, routine syncs silent.
- Fixed Check for updates hanging on Checking for updates... - the result is now marshaled to the GUI thread via a Qt Signal.
